attempts.strategy: Append the plan-agent probe-confirmed term-mode body verbatim inside the existing `section CoverTotality` (after iter-032's `HModule_top_linearEquiv` and before `end CoverTotality`). Body: `LinearEquiv.ofLinear` over two `Abelian.Ext.precompOfLinear` maps via the iter-031 source iso's hom/inv, with both round-trip equations closed by the same four-step rewrite chain as iter-032 (`← Abelian.Ext.comp_assoc_of_second_deg_zero` + `Abelian.Ext.mk₀_comp_mk₀` + iso identity + `Abelian.Ext.mk₀_id_comp`). Universe-`u` parallel of iter-032's `u+1` form — Lean's universe inference adapts every Ext.* API piece automatically because the LHS `HModule' k F n T` (iter-014, ascribed `Type u`) forces `Ext.{u}` everywhere.
attempts.code_tried:
noncomputable def HModule'_top_linearEquiv
    (k : Type u) [Field k]
    {C : Type v} [Category.{u, v} C] {J : GrothendieckTopology C}
    [HasWeakSheafify J (Type u)] [HasSheafify J (ModuleCat.{u} k)]
    [HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
    (F : Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k)) (n : ℕ) {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) :
    HModule' k F n T
      ≃ₗ[k] Abelian.Ext ((constantSheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k)).obj
              (ModuleCat.of k k)) F n :=
  let α := HModule'_top_sourceIso k hT
  LinearEquiv.ofLinear
    ((Abelian.Ext.mk₀ α.inv).precompOfLinear k F (zero_add n))
    ((Abelian.Ext.mk₀ α.hom).precompOfLinear k F (zero_add n))
    (by
      ext x
      change (Abelian.Ext.mk₀ α.inv).comp
        ((Abelian.Ext.mk₀ α.hom).comp x (zero_add n)) (zero_add n) = x
      rw [← Abelian.Ext.comp_assoc_of_second_deg_zero, Abelian.Ext.mk₀_comp_mk₀,
          α.inv_hom_id, Abelian.Ext.mk₀_id_comp])
    (by
      ext y
      change (Abelian.Ext.mk₀ α.hom).comp
        ((Abelian.Ext.mk₀ α.inv).comp y (zero_add n)) (zero_add n) = y
      rw [← Abelian.Ext.comp_assoc_of_second_deg_zero, Abelian.Ext.mk₀_comp_mk₀,
          α.hom_inv_id, Abelian.Ext.mk₀_id_comp])

attempts.goal_after: Post-edit: `lean_diagnostic_messages` returned `{errors: [], warnings: [], error_count: 0, warning_count: 0, clean: true}`. The new declaration sits at L788; `end CoverTotality` now at L815. `lean_verify` confirms kernel-only axioms `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.
attempts.insight: Universe-`u` parallel of iter-032's universe-`u+1` form drops in by reusing the iter-032 body shape verbatim. No explicit `Abelian.Ext.{u}` annotation is needed because the LHS `HModule' k F n T : Type u` (iter-014 ascription) forces every `Ext.*` API piece in the body to inherit universe `u` automatically via Lean's universe inference. Contrast iter-032 which required explicit `Abelian.Ext.{u+1}` to match `HModule k F n : Type (u+1)`. The body is strictly shorter than iter-032's by virtue of needing no universe annotation. Round-trip directions match iter-032 verbatim (`α.inv_hom_id` for round-trip 1, `α.hom_inv_id` for round-trip 2). Single-Edit closure with no fallback — sixteenth consecutive substantive occurrence (sessions 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 34, 35, 37, 38, 39, 40, 46, 47).

next_steps: Iter-034: build the Step 3-finish universe-bump bridge `Ext.{u} X₂ F n ≃ₗ[k] Ext.{u+1} X₂ F n` (where X₂ = (constantSheaf J _).obj (ModuleCat.of k k)). This requires upgrading Mathlib's `Abelian.Ext.chgUniv` (currently bare `Equiv`, Mathlib/Algebra/Homology/DerivedCategory/Ext/Basic.lean L540) to a `LinearEquiv`. Recommended route: prove the `LinearEquiv` upgrade as a local helper `Ext.chgUnivLinearEquiv` in `Cohomology/MayerVietoris.lean`. Once that lands, compose iter-033 → universe-bump → iter-032 to obtain the full bridge `HModule' k F n T ≃ₗ[k] HModule k F n` for terminal T. Subsequent steps: affine-vanishing input `H^{>0}(Spec A, F) = 0` (Step 4), finiteness of each `H^0` piece (Step 5), `Module.Finite k (HModule k F i)` instance feeding `smoothOfRelativeDimension_genus` (Step 6, completing Phase A step 6 *Path 2*).
